title: Custom Apps using Monday Framework work on the mobile app
excerpt:
We would like monday framework features other than integrations to work on the monday mobile app. 
I recognize that there is the option to request the desktop view in a mobile browser, but we would like the UI to be more…

posts.author: brad-explore (Brad Law)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would like monday framework features other than integrations to work on the monday mobile app.

I recognize that there is the option to request the desktop view in a mobile browser, but we would like the UI to be more native to the device by using the monday app to increase usability of it on tablets and phones.

More specifically, we are creating an item view and we want to view it on the phone or tablet. I’ve seen other similar request that have been since closed where they have custom board views they want to see on the mobile app.

posts.author: okojava88 (Davis)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s awesome to see that you’re looking to make custom apps within the Monday framework more user-friendly on mobile devices! For a more native experience tailored to phones and tablets, you might want to explore different custom mobile app development services.

These services can help you design and integrate a fully optimized mobile interface, ensuring seamless compatibility with the Monday app while meeting your specific requirements, like custom item and board views. Have you considered partnering with a development team to create a solution perfectly suited to your needs?
